name: trace_window_clip_rerender
description: v2.7.3 W3 stub (profile lands in W3): capture pre (geometry + pixel hash), then commit a shrunken window that hides 'discovery' (t1) and clips a straddler -> assert t1's bar/label/progress shapes absent, its rail row still present (SR-WIN-14/19), the straddler truncated with the non-interactive continuation glyph and NO overhanging label prims (SR-WIN-15/16), DEP elbows to hidden/clipped endpoints dropped as units (SR-WIN-17), PP_DOC unchanged except windowStart/End, paint lock engaged (no content flash, SR-WIN-25); with t1 selected before the commit, ownSel resets to component context, and a nudge that pushes a selected task out of the window resets it too (SR-WIN-26); create-at-point and drag on the clipped chart land on the clicked day (SR-WIN-22); finally expand the window back -> geometry/props IDENTICAL to the pre capture via dump + pixel hash (the lossless guarantee, SR-WIN-20).
